tools.name: AI Image Generator
tools.description: Generate stunning AI images from text prompts instantly. Create photorealistic photos, digital art, anime, and illustrations for free. No signup required, unlimited generations, and 100% private browser-based processing.
features: Generate AI images from text descriptions in seconds
Multiple art styles including photorealistic, anime, digital art, and illustration
High-resolution output suitable for social media and print
No signup or account creation required
Unlimited image generations with no daily limits
100% private — images are processed in your browser
Download images in PNG format with no watermarks
Simple prompt-based interface for beginners and pros

faqs.question: How does the AI image generator work?
faqs.answer: Type a description of the image you want to create in the text box. The AI analyzes your prompt and generates a unique image matching your description. You can specify styles, colors, subjects, and artistic techniques.

faqs.question: Is the AI image generator free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit AI Image Generator is completely free. There are no limits on the number of images you can generate, no signup is required, and all downloaded images have no watermarks.

faqs.question: Can I use AI-generated images commercially?
faqs.answer: Images generated by our tool can be used for personal and commercial purposes. However, we recommend checking the specific licensing terms if you plan to use them for large-scale commercial projects.

faqs.question: What types of images can I create?
faqs.answer: You can create virtually any type of image — photorealistic photos, digital paintings, anime characters, illustrations, logos, landscapes, product mockups, abstract art, and more. The more detailed your prompt, the better the result.

faqs.question: How do I write a good AI image prompt?
faqs.answer: Be specific and descriptive. Include the subject, style, lighting, colors, and mood you want. For example: 'A cozy coffee shop at sunset, warm lighting, watercolor painting style, autumn colors' produces better results than just 'coffee shop'.

howTo.title: Describe Your Image
howTo.description: Type a detailed description of the image you want to create in the text input field. Include style, colors, mood, and subject details for best results.

howTo.title: Choose a Style
howTo.description: Select an art style if available — such as photorealistic, anime, digital art, watercolor, or oil painting. This helps guide the AI generation.

howTo.title: Generate the Image
howTo.description: Click the Generate button and wait a few seconds while the AI creates your image based on the description.

howTo.title: Review and Refine
howTo.description: Look at the generated image. If it is not quite right, adjust your prompt with more specific details and generate again.

howTo.title: Download Your Image
howTo.description: When you are happy with the result, click the Download button to save the image as a high-resolution PNG file to your device.

tools.article:
## What is AI Image Generator?

AI Image Generator is a powerful, free online tool designed to help you work with files quickly and efficiently. Whether you're a professional, student, or casual user, our tool provides a simple, intuitive interface that gets the job done without any hassle.

Unlike many online tools that require registration, subscriptions, or software downloads, AI Image Generator works entirely in your browser. This means you can start using it immediately without creating an account or sharing any personal information.

## Why Choose Our AI Image Generator?

### 🚀 Fast and Efficient
Our AI Image Generator is optimized for speed and performance. Most operations complete in seconds, allowing you to work efficiently without waiting.

### 🔒 Privacy-Focused
Your privacy is our top priority. All processing happens directly in your browser, meaning your files never leave your device. We don't store, collect, or share any of your data.

### 💯 Completely Free
There are no hidden costs, premium tiers, or usage limits. AI Image Generator is 100% free to use, forever.

### 📱 Works Everywhere
Use AI Image Generator on any device - desktop, laptop, tablet, or smartphone. The responsive design adapts to your screen size for optimal usability.

### 🎯 No Signup Required
Start using AI Image Generator immediately without creating an account, providing an email address, or downloading any software.

## Common Use Cases

### Professional Use
Professionals use AI Image Generator for their daily workflow tasks. The tool's reliability and speed make it perfect for business environments where time is valuable.

### Educational Purposes
Students and educators find AI Image Generator helpful for academic projects and assignments. It's a great resource for learning and teaching.

### Personal Projects
Whether you're working on a personal project or just need to process files quickly, AI Image Generator provides the functionality you need without complexity.

## Tips for Best Results

1. **Prepare Your Files**: Ensure your files are in a supported format before uploading for faster processing.

2. **Check Settings**: Review all available settings to customize the output according to your specific needs.

3. **Use Modern Browsers**: For best performance, use the latest version of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge.

4. **Consider File Size**: While AI Image Generator can handle large files, smaller files process faster and are easier to work with.

5. **Save Your Work**: Always download your results immediately after processing. Since we don't store files, closing the page will lose your work.

## Get Started Now

Ready to use AI Image Generator? Simply scroll up and start using the tool - no signup required. If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to contact us.
tools.seoDescription: Privacy-friendly, 100% client-side AI Image Generator online. Run secure local processing in your browser with zero file uploads and no data selling. Fast, safe, and free forever.

tools.name: AI Voice Generator
tools.description: Convert text to natural-sounding AI voices instantly. Our free text-to-speech tool offers multiple languages and accents for professional voiceovers, accessibility, and creative projects. No signup required.
features: Convert text to natural-sounding AI speech instantly
Multiple voice options including male, female, and different accents
Support for multiple languages and regional dialects
Adjustable speech speed and pitch controls
Download generated audio as MP3 files
No signup or account creation required
Unlimited text-to-speech conversions with no daily limits
Works directly in your browser — no software installation

faqs.question: How do I convert text to AI speech?
faqs.answer: Type or paste your text into the input field above, select a voice style, and click Generate. The AI will convert your text to natural-sounding speech that you can preview and download.

faqs.question: What languages are supported?
faqs.answer: Our AI voice generator supports multiple languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, Chinese, and more. Each language offers multiple voice options.

faqs.question: Can I use the generated voice for commercial projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, audio generated with SopKit AI Voice Generator can be used for personal and commercial projects including videos, podcasts, presentations, and accessibility features.

faqs.question: Is this text-to-speech tool free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit AI Voice Generator is completely free with no registration required. Convert unlimited text to speech with no daily limits or watermarks.

faqs.question: How do I make the AI voice sound more natural?
faqs.answer: Break your text into natural sentences with proper punctuation. Use commas for pauses and periods for longer breaks. Avoid run-on sentences and use paragraph breaks for longer content.

howTo.title: Enter Your Text
howTo.description: Type or paste the text you want to convert to speech into the input field. You can enter up to several thousand characters.

howTo.title: Choose a Voice
howTo.description: Select from the available voice options. Pick a voice that matches the tone and language of your content.

howTo.title: Adjust Settings
howTo.description: Fine-tune the speech speed and pitch if the options are available. Slower speeds work well for educational content.

howTo.title: Generate Speech
howTo.description: Click the Generate button and wait a moment while the AI converts your text to speech.

howTo.title: Preview and Download
howTo.description: Listen to the generated audio. If you are satisfied, click Download to save it as an MP3 file.

tools.name: AI Music Generator
tools.description: Generate full-length AI songs with vocals and instrumentation from text prompts using MiniMax Music 2.6 on Cloudflare AI. Royalty-free music generation with studio-grade quality. Free this week!
features: Generate full-length songs with natural vocals and layered instrumentation using MiniMax Music 2.6
Instrumental mode for background music, video scores, and ambient soundscapes
Lyrics Optimizer auto-writes lyrics from your style prompt — no writing needed
14+ song structure tags including [Verse], [Chorus], [Bridge], [Drop], [Outro] for precise arrangement control
Studio-grade audio output up to 44.1kHz sample rate and 256kbps bitrate
Export in MP3 or WAV format for any professional production workflow
Completely free this week via Cloudflare Workers AI — no cost, no signup
All generated music is royalty-free and cleared for commercial use

steps.name: Write a Style Prompt
steps.text: Describe the sound you want — genre, mood, vocal style, tempo, and instruments. Example: 'Indie folk, melancholic, female vocal, fingerpicked acoustic guitar, 75 BPM.'

steps.name: Add Lyrics or Use Auto-Generate
steps.text: Paste your own lyrics with structure tags like [Verse] and [Chorus], enable Lyrics Optimizer to auto-write from your prompt, or turn on Instrumental Mode for vocals-free tracks.

steps.name: Generate and Download
steps.text: Click Generate. Your song is ready in seconds. Preview it in the browser, then download in MP3 or WAV at your chosen quality settings.

faqs.question: What is MiniMax Music 2.6?
faqs.answer: MiniMax Music 2.6 is an advanced AI music generation model released in April 2026. It creates complete, studio-quality songs with vocals and instrumentation from text prompts and lyrics, or instrumental-only tracks.

faqs.question: Is the AI Music Generator really free?
faqs.answer: Yes — MiniMax Music 2.6 is free this week on Cloudflare Workers AI. You can generate unlimited songs at no cost. No credit card or signup is required.

faqs.question: Can I use the generated music commercially?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All music generated is royalty-free and cleared for commercial use including YouTube videos, podcasts, game soundtracks, advertisements, and branded content.

faqs.question: Do I need to write lyrics?
faqs.answer: No. You have three options: write your own lyrics with structure tags, enable Lyrics Optimizer to auto-generate lyrics from your prompt, or enable Instrumental Mode to create music without vocals.

faqs.question: What audio quality can I export?
faqs.answer: You can export in MP3 or WAV format with sample rates up to 44.1kHz and bitrates up to 256kbps, making the output suitable for professional production workflows.

tools.article:
## Fast, Private Image Compression
Large images can slow down websites and consume unnecessary storage. This utility is designed to reduce your file sizes instantly without sacrificing noticeable quality.

### Example
If you have a 5MB high-resolution photograph, our tool can compress it to under 200KB while preserving the core visual details. This is perfect for web publishing, email attachments, and general storage optimization.

### Common Use Cases
- Web developers optimizing assets for faster Core Web Vitals.
- Photographers sharing proofs with clients over email.
- Everyday users clearing up space on their devices.

faqs.question: What formats do you support?
faqs.answer: We support JPG, PNG, WEBP, and more, depending on your browser capabilities.

faqs.question: Do you store my images?
faqs.answer: No. Everything is compressed using client-side technology. Your data stays with you.

faqs.question: Is there a limit to how many I can compress?
faqs.answer: You can compress as many images as you need for free.

faqs.question: Does this affect the image dimensions?
faqs.answer: By default, compression only reduces file size. You can optionally resize dimensions if needed.

steps.name: Select Image
steps.text: Choose the image you want to compress from your device.

steps.name: Set Target
steps.text: Select your desired file size or compression level.

steps.name: Save
steps.text: Download the compressed file directly.

faqs.question: How do I view EXIF data from a photo?
faqs.answer: Upload your image by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping your file. The tool will instantly extract and display all EXIF metadata including camera settings, date, GPS location, and more.

faqs.question: What information does EXIF data contain?
faqs.answer: EXIF data can include camera make and model, aperture, shutter speed, ISO, focal length, date and time, GPS coordinates, image dimensions, software used, and copyright information.

faqs.question: Can I find the location where a photo was taken?
faqs.answer: If the photo contains GPS data in its EXIF metadata, the tool will display the coordinates and location. Note that many social media platforms strip GPS data when uploading.

faqs.question: Is my photo data private when using this tool?
faqs.answer: Yes, all EXIF extraction happens entirely in your browser. Your images are never uploaded to or stored on our servers. The process is 100% private and secure.

faqs.question: Is this EXIF reader free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit EXIF Reader is completely free with no registration required. Read metadata from unlimited images with no restrictions.

howTo.title: Upload Your Image
howTo.description: Click the upload area or drag and drop your image file. Supports JPG, JPEG, TIFF, and other formats with embedded EXIF data.

howTo.title: View EXIF Data
howTo.description: The tool will automatically extract and display all metadata fields from your image in an organized format.

howTo.title: Check Camera Settings
howTo.description: Review camera-specific data like aperture, shutter speed, ISO, focal length, and white balance settings.

howTo.title: View GPS Location
howTo.description: If available, check the GPS coordinates and location where the photo was taken. A map preview may be shown.

howTo.title: Copy or Export Data
howTo.description: Copy individual metadata fields or export the complete EXIF data for your records.

tools.article:
## What is EXIF Reader?

EXIF Reader is a powerful, free online tool designed to help you work with files quickly and efficiently. Whether you're a professional, student, or casual user, our tool provides a simple, intuitive interface that gets the job done without any hassle.

Unlike many online tools that require registration, subscriptions, or software downloads, EXIF Reader works entirely in your browser. This means you can start using it immediately without creating an account or sharing any personal information.

## Why Choose Our EXIF Reader?

### 🚀 Fast and Efficient
Our EXIF Reader is optimized for speed and performance. Most operations complete in seconds, allowing you to work efficiently without waiting.

### 🔒 Privacy-Focused
Your privacy is our top priority. All processing happens directly in your browser, meaning your files never leave your device. We don't store, collect, or share any of your data.

### 💯 Completely Free
There are no hidden costs, premium tiers, or usage limits. EXIF Reader is 100% free to use, forever.

### 📱 Works Everywhere
Use EXIF Reader on any device - desktop, laptop, tablet, or smartphone. The responsive design adapts to your screen size for optimal usability.

### 🎯 No Signup Required
Start using EXIF Reader immediately without creating an account, providing an email address, or downloading any software.

## Common Use Cases

### Professional Use
Professionals use EXIF Reader for their daily workflow tasks. The tool's reliability and speed make it perfect for business environments where time is valuable.

### Educational Purposes
Students and educators find EXIF Reader helpful for academic projects and assignments. It's a great resource for learning and teaching.

### Personal Projects
Whether you're working on a personal project or just need to process files quickly, EXIF Reader provides the functionality you need without complexity.

## Tips for Best Results

1. **Prepare Your Files**: Ensure your files are in a supported format before uploading for faster processing.

2. **Check Settings**: Review all available settings to customize the output according to your specific needs.

3. **Use Modern Browsers**: For best performance, use the latest version of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge.

4. **Consider File Size**: While EXIF Reader can handle large files, smaller files process faster and are easier to work with.

5. **Save Your Work**: Always download your results immediately after processing. Since we don't store files, closing the page will lose your work.

## Get Started Now

Ready to use EXIF Reader? Simply scroll up and start using the tool - no signup required. If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to contact us.

## What is Logo Generator?

Logo Generator is a powerful, free online tool designed to help you work with files quickly and efficiently. Whether you're a professional, student, or casual user, our tool provides a simple, intuitive interface that gets the job done without any hassle.

Unlike many online tools that require registration, subscriptions, or software downloads, Logo Generator works entirely in your browser. This means you can start using it immediately without creating an account or sharing any personal information.

## Why Choose Our Logo Generator?

### 🚀 Fast and Efficient
Our Logo Generator is optimized for speed and performance. Most operations complete in seconds, allowing you to work efficiently without waiting.

### 🔒 Privacy-Focused
Your privacy is our top priority. All processing happens directly in your browser, meaning your files never leave your device. We don't store, collect, or share any of your data.

### 💯 Completely Free
There are no hidden costs, premium tiers, or usage limits. Logo Generator is 100% free to use, forever.

### 📱 Works Everywhere
Use Logo Generator on any device - desktop, laptop, tablet, or smartphone. The responsive design adapts to your screen size for optimal usability.

### 🎯 No Signup Required
Start using Logo Generator immediately without creating an account, providing an email address, or downloading any software.

## Common Use Cases

### Professional Use
Professionals use Logo Generator for their daily workflow tasks. The tool's reliability and speed make it perfect for business environments where time is valuable.

### Educational Purposes
Students and educators find Logo Generator helpful for academic projects and assignments. It's a great resource for learning and teaching.

### Personal Projects
Whether you're working on a personal project or just need to process files quickly, Logo Generator provides the functionality you need without complexity.

## Tips for Best Results

1. **Prepare Your Files**: Ensure your files are in a supported format before uploading for faster processing.

2. **Check Settings**: Review all available settings to customize the output according to your specific needs.

3. **Use Modern Browsers**: For best performance, use the latest version of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge.

4. **Consider File Size**: While Logo Generator can handle large files, smaller files process faster and are easier to work with.

5. **Save Your Work**: Always download your results immediately after processing. Since we don't store files, closing the page will lose your work.

## Get Started Now

Ready to use Logo Generator? Simply scroll up and start using the tool - no signup required. If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to contact us.

tools.article:
## Fast, Private Image Compression
Large images can slow down websites and consume unnecessary storage. This utility is designed to reduce your file sizes instantly without sacrificing noticeable quality.

### Example
If you have a 5MB high-resolution photograph, our tool can compress it to under 200KB while preserving the core visual details. This is perfect for web publishing, email attachments, and general storage optimization.

### Common Use Cases
- Web developers optimizing assets for faster Core Web Vitals.
- Photographers sharing proofs with clients over email.
- Everyday users clearing up space on their devices.

faqs.question: What formats do you support?
faqs.answer: We support JPG, PNG, WEBP, and more, depending on your browser capabilities.

faqs.question: Do you store my images?
faqs.answer: No. Everything is compressed using client-side technology. Your data stays with you.

faqs.question: Is there a limit to how many I can compress?
faqs.answer: You can compress as many images as you need for free.

faqs.question: Does this affect the image dimensions?
faqs.answer: By default, compression only reduces file size. You can optionally resize dimensions if needed.

faqs.question: What is a good ATS score?
faqs.answer: A score above 75-80% is generally considered strong for most Applicant Tracking Systems. However, the higher the score, the better your chances of getting shortlisted.

faqs.question: Can ATS read PDF resumes?
faqs.answer: Yes, modern ATS can read standard PDF resumes. However, simple text-based PDFs work best. Avoid complex layouts, tables, and images inside the PDF.

faqs.question: Should I use tables in my resume?
faqs.answer: No, it's safer to avoid tables as some ATS might struggle to parse the content correctly, potentially leading to jumbled data.

faqs.question: How do I match my resume to a job description?
faqs.answer: Use our tool to paste both your resume and the job description. We'll highlight the key skills and keywords you're missing so you can add them naturally.

tools.article:
## Browser-Based Developer Utilities
Developers need tools that are fast, reliable, and secure. Our suite of text and code utilities is designed to run entirely in your browser, ensuring your proprietary code or sensitive strings are never sent over the network.

### Example
Paste a minified JSON payload to instantly format it into readable syntax, complete with color highlighting and syntax validation. Or securely encode and decode base64 strings without relying on server-side processing.

### Common Use Cases
- Debugging API responses.
- Formatting minified code for code reviews.
- Quickly comparing text differences or counting characters.

faqs.question: Is my code secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. All processing is executed client-side via JavaScript. Your code never leaves your computer.

faqs.question: Do you support large files?
faqs.answer: Yes, our tools are optimized to handle large text blobs efficiently without crashing the browser.

faqs.question: Can I use this for proprietary company data?
faqs.answer: Because it processes locally, it is generally safe for proprietary data, but always follow your company's security policies.

faqs.question: Do I need to install any extensions?
faqs.answer: No, these are purely web-based utilities that require no installation.

howTo.name: How to use YouTube Playlist Link Extractor

steps.name: Paste a playlist URL or ID
steps.text: Enter a YouTube playlist link such as https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL... or paste the playlist ID directly into the input field.

steps.name: Click Extract
steps.text: Run the extractor to fetch all videos from the playlist using the external playlist API.

steps.name: Review the extracted data
steps.text: See titles, video URLs, IDs, and publish dates in the results table.

steps.name: Download CSV
steps.text: Export the playlist video list to CSV for spreadsheets, research, or content planning.

faqs.question: How do I use the YouTube Playlist Link Extractor?
faqs.answer: Paste a public YouTube playlist URL or playlist ID, then click Extract. The tool returns every video link, title, ID, and published date in the playlist.

faqs.question: Does this tool need a YouTube API key?
faqs.answer: No, this tool uses a public playlist extraction API so you can extract playlist links without providing an API key.

faqs.question: Can I extract links from any public playlist?
faqs.answer: Yes, as long as the playlist is public and not private or restricted, the extractor can fetch the video links.

faqs.question: How can I save the extracted links?
faqs.answer: Use the Download CSV button to save the playlist video list with video IDs, URLs, titles, and publish dates.

tools.article:
## What is YouTube Playlist Link Extractor?

YouTube Playlist Link Extractor is a fast, free tool for pulling every video link out of a public YouTube playlist. It returns titles, IDs, URLs, and publish dates in a clean format so you can save, analyze, or reuse playlist data.

## Why use this tool?

Many playlist users want to export all video links without copying them one by one. This tool automates the process and works without a YouTube API key or signup. You can use it for content planning, SEO research, playlist auditing, or building your own video lists.

## How this tool helps creators and marketers

- Quickly extract every video in a playlist for reference or sharing.
- Save the results as a CSV file for publishing, influencer research, or project tracking.
- Avoid manual playlist scraping and save time on bulk playlist tasks.

## Use cases

- Content marketers extracting playlist links for research.
- Creators building video collections or playlists for tutorials.
- Analysts compiling video URLs for SEO or competitor analysis.
- Anyone needing a clean list of videos from a YouTube playlist.

tools.article:
## Browser-Based Developer Utilities
Developers need tools that are fast, reliable, and secure. Our suite of text and code utilities is designed to run entirely in your browser, ensuring your proprietary code or sensitive strings are never sent over the network.

### Example
Paste a minified JSON payload to instantly format it into readable syntax, complete with color highlighting and syntax validation. Or securely encode and decode base64 strings without relying on server-side processing.

### Common Use Cases
- Debugging API responses.
- Formatting minified code for code reviews.
- Quickly comparing text differences or counting characters.

faqs.question: Is my code secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. All processing is executed client-side via JavaScript. Your code never leaves your computer.

faqs.question: Do you support large files?
faqs.answer: Yes, our tools are optimized to handle large text blobs efficiently without crashing the browser.

faqs.question: Can I use this for proprietary company data?
faqs.answer: Because it processes locally, it is generally safe for proprietary data, but always follow your company's security policies.

faqs.question: Do I need to install any extensions?
faqs.answer: No, these are purely web-based utilities that require no installation.

tools.name: Adsense Calculator
tools.description: Free adsense calculator tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
tools.article:
## Understand Your Ad Revenue Potential
Estimating potential earnings from display ads can be confusing due to variables like Page RPM, CTR, and CPC. This calculator helps publishers project their daily, monthly, and yearly income based on traffic and engagement metrics.

### Page RPM vs. Impressions
Page Revenue Per Mille (RPM) is the estimated earnings for every 1,000 pageviews. It is a more holistic metric than looking at individual ad impressions, as it accounts for the total value a page generates. Traffic quality, niche, and user location heavily influence these metrics.

### Common Use Cases
- Planning monetization strategies for new blogs.
- Setting traffic goals to reach specific income targets (e.g., $100/day).
- Comparing current performance against industry benchmarks.

faqs.question: Are these earnings guaranteed?
faqs.answer: No, this is purely an estimation tool. Actual earnings vary widely based on seasonality, ad placement, and advertiser bids.

faqs.question: What is a good RPM?
faqs.answer: A 'good' RPM depends on your niche. Entertainment might see $1-$3, while finance or tech can see $10-$30+.

faqs.question: Does this calculator save my site data?
faqs.answer: No, all inputs are processed locally in your browser for your privacy.

faqs.question: How can I improve my earnings?
faqs.answer: Focus on high-quality content, optimize your Core Web Vitals, and ensure your AdSense placements follow best practices without overwhelming the user.

steps.name: Enter Traffic
steps.text: Input your estimated monthly pageviews.

steps.name: Set Metrics
steps.text: Adjust the CTR, CPC, or use an estimated Page RPM.

steps.name: View Projection
steps.text: Instantly see your projected daily, monthly, and annual earnings.

tools.article:
## Browser-Based Developer Utilities
Developers need tools that are fast, reliable, and secure. Our suite of text and code utilities is designed to run entirely in your browser, ensuring your proprietary code or sensitive strings are never sent over the network.

### Example
Paste a minified JSON payload to instantly format it into readable syntax, complete with color highlighting and syntax validation. Or securely encode and decode base64 strings without relying on server-side processing.

### Common Use Cases
- Debugging API responses.
- Formatting minified code for code reviews.
- Quickly comparing text differences or counting characters.

faqs.question: Is my code secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. All processing is executed client-side via JavaScript. Your code never leaves your computer.

faqs.question: Do you support large files?
faqs.answer: Yes, our tools are optimized to handle large text blobs efficiently without crashing the browser.

faqs.question: Can I use this for proprietary company data?
faqs.answer: Because it processes locally, it is generally safe for proprietary data, but always follow your company's security policies.

faqs.question: Do I need to install any extensions?
faqs.answer: No, these are purely web-based utilities that require no installation.

features: Measure download speed, upload speed, and ping latency
Real-time speed test with live progress visualization
Works on any device — desktop, tablet, and mobile
No software installation or Flash required
Test results in Mbps (megabits per second)
Compare your speed against typical broadband benchmarks
Fast test — results in under 30 seconds
Unlimited free tests with no restrictions

faqs.question: How do I test my internet speed?
faqs.answer: Click the Start Test button above. The tool will measure your download speed, upload speed, and ping latency. Results are displayed in Mbps within about 30 seconds.

faqs.question: What is a good internet speed?
faqs.answer: For basic browsing and email, 10-25 Mbps is sufficient. For streaming HD video, 25-50 Mbps is recommended. For gaming and 4K streaming, 50-100+ Mbps is ideal. Upload speed of 10+ Mbps is good for video calls.

faqs.question: Why is my internet speed slower than expected?
faqs.answer: Speed can be affected by WiFi vs ethernet connection, number of connected devices, time of day, router quality, and your ISP plan. Try testing with an ethernet cable for the most accurate results.

faqs.question: What is ping and why does it matter?
faqs.answer: Ping (latency) measures the time it takes for data to travel to a server and back, in milliseconds. Lower ping is better — under 20ms is excellent, under 50ms is good for gaming, and under 100ms is acceptable for general use.

faqs.question: Is this speed test free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit Internet Speed Test is completely free with no registration required. Run unlimited tests to monitor your connection quality.

howTo.title: Close Other Applications
howTo.description: For the most accurate results, close other applications and browser tabs that use your internet connection.

howTo.title: Start the Test
howTo.description: Click the Start Test button. The tool will automatically begin measuring your connection speed.

howTo.title: Wait for Results
howTo.description: The test takes about 20-30 seconds. It measures download speed first, then upload speed, and finally ping latency.

howTo.title: Review Your Speed
howTo.description: Check your download speed, upload speed, and ping results. Compare them against your ISP plan speeds.

howTo.title: Run Multiple Tests
howTo.description: Run the test at different times of day to get a complete picture of your internet performance.

tools.article:
## What is Internet Speed Test?

Internet Speed Test is a powerful, free online tool designed to help you work with files quickly and efficiently. Whether you're a professional, student, or casual user, our tool provides a simple, intuitive interface that gets the job done without any hassle.

Unlike many online tools that require registration, subscriptions, or software downloads, Internet Speed Test works entirely in your browser. This means you can start using it immediately without creating an account or sharing any personal information.

## Why Choose Our Internet Speed Test?

### 🚀 Fast and Efficient
Our Internet Speed Test is optimized for speed and performance. Most operations complete in seconds, allowing you to work efficiently without waiting.

### 🔒 Privacy-Focused
Your privacy is our top priority. All processing happens directly in your browser, meaning your files never leave your device. We don't store, collect, or share any of your data.

### 💯 Completely Free
There are no hidden costs, premium tiers, or usage limits. Internet Speed Test is 100% free to use, forever.

### 📱 Works Everywhere
Use Internet Speed Test on any device - desktop, laptop, tablet, or smartphone. The responsive design adapts to your screen size for optimal usability.

### 🎯 No Signup Required
Start using Internet Speed Test immediately without creating an account, providing an email address, or downloading any software.

## Common Use Cases

### Professional Use
Professionals use Internet Speed Test for their daily workflow tasks. The tool's reliability and speed make it perfect for business environments where time is valuable.

### Educational Purposes
Students and educators find Internet Speed Test helpful for academic projects and assignments. It's a great resource for learning and teaching.

### Personal Projects
Whether you're working on a personal project or just need to process files quickly, Internet Speed Test provides the functionality you need without complexity.

## Tips for Best Results

1. **Prepare Your Files**: Ensure your files are in a supported format before uploading for faster processing.

2. **Check Settings**: Review all available settings to customize the output according to your specific needs.

3. **Use Modern Browsers**: For best performance, use the latest version of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge.

4. **Consider File Size**: While Internet Speed Test can handle large files, smaller files process faster and are easier to work with.

5. **Save Your Work**: Always download your results immediately after processing. Since we don't store files, closing the page will lose your work.

## Get Started Now

Ready to use Internet Speed Test? Simply scroll up and start using the tool - no signup required. If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to contact us.

faqs.question: How do I create a strong password?
faqs.answer: Use the password generator above to create a random password with at least 16 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special symbols. Avoid using personal information or common words.

faqs.question: How long should a strong password be?
faqs.answer: A strong password should be at least 12-16 characters long. For critical accounts like banking or email, use 20+ characters. Longer passwords are exponentially harder to crack.

faqs.question: Is this password generator secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, passwords are generated entirely in your browser using cryptographic random number generation. No passwords are sent to or stored on our servers. The generation happens 100% client-side.

faqs.question: Should I use the same password for multiple accounts?
faqs.answer: Never reuse passwords across accounts. If one account is compromised, all accounts with the same password are at risk. Use a unique password for each account and consider a password manager.

faqs.question: Is this password generator free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit Password Generator is completely free with no registration required. Generate unlimited strong passwords with no restrictions.

howTo.title: Set Password Length
howTo.description: Use the slider or input field to set your desired password length. 16 characters or more is recommended for strong security.

howTo.title: Choose Character Types
howTo.description: Select which character types to include: uppercase letters (A-Z), lowercase letters (a-z), numbers (0-9), and special symbols (!@#$%).

howTo.title: Generate Password
howTo.description: Click the Generate button to create a random password based on your selected settings.

howTo.title: Check Strength
howTo.description: Review the password strength indicator. Aim for a Strong or Very Strong rating for maximum security.

howTo.title: Copy and Use
howTo.description: Click the Copy button to copy the password to your clipboard, then paste it into the account or application where you need it.

faqs.question: How do I research keywords for SEO?
faqs.answer: Enter a seed keyword or topic into the input field above and click Research. The tool will show related keywords with search volume, difficulty score, CPC, and trend data to help you find the best opportunities.

faqs.question: What is keyword difficulty?
faqs.answer: Keyword difficulty (KD) is a score from 0-100 that estimates how hard it is to rank on the first page of Google for that keyword. Lower scores (0-30) are easier to rank for, while higher scores (70+) indicate strong competition.

faqs.question: How do I find long-tail keywords?
faqs.answer: Enter a broad topic keyword and the tool will generate long-tail variations — longer, more specific phrases with lower competition. These are often easier to rank for and attract more targeted traffic.

faqs.question: Can I research keywords for different countries?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can select different countries to see location-specific search volume and competition data. This is useful for local SEO and international content strategies.

faqs.question: Is this keyword research tool free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit Advanced Keyword Research is completely free with no registration required. Research unlimited keywords with no daily limits or data restrictions.

howTo.title: Enter a Seed Keyword
howTo.description: Type a broad topic or keyword related to your niche into the input field. For example, 'digital marketing' or 'best running shoes'.

howTo.title: Select Target Country
howTo.description: Choose the country you want to target. This affects search volume and competition data.

howTo.title: Click Research
howTo.description: Press the Research button to generate a list of related keywords with metrics.

howTo.title: Analyze the Results
howTo.description: Review the keyword list sorted by search volume. Look for keywords with good volume and low to medium difficulty.

howTo.title: Export Keywords
howTo.description: Click Export CSV to download the keyword data for use in your content planning and SEO strategy.

features: Analyze technical SEO issues including meta tags, headings, and structure
Check on-page optimization for target keywords
Audit page speed and Core Web Vitals metrics
Review mobile-friendliness and responsive design
Identify missing alt text, broken links, and crawl errors
Get actionable recommendations prioritized by impact
Export audit results as a downloadable report
No signup required — instant analysis for any URL

faqs.question: How do I run an SEO audit on my website?
faqs.answer: Enter your website URL in the input field above and click Run Audit. The tool will analyze your site's technical SEO, on-page optimization, content quality, and provide a prioritized list of issues and recommendations.

faqs.question: What does the SEO audit check for?
faqs.answer: The audit checks meta tags, heading structure, image alt text, page speed, mobile-friendliness, internal linking, broken links, schema markup, and content quality. Each issue is categorized by priority level.

faqs.question: How often should I run an SEO audit?
faqs.answer: Run a full audit at least once a month, and after any major site changes like redesigns, new page additions, or URL structure changes. Regular audits help catch issues before they impact rankings.

faqs.question: Is this SEO audit tool free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit Complete SEO Audit Tool is completely free with no registration required. Run unlimited audits on any website without restrictions.

faqs.question: Can I audit competitor websites?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can enter any public website URL to run an audit. This is useful for comparing your site's SEO health against competitors and identifying areas for improvement.

howTo.title: Enter Your Website URL
howTo.description: Type or paste your website URL into the input field. Include the full URL with https:// for best results.

howTo.title: Run the Audit
howTo.description: Click the Run Audit button. The tool will crawl your page and analyze dozens of SEO factors.

howTo.title: Review the Results
howTo.description: Examine the audit results organized by category — technical SEO, on-page, content, and performance.

howTo.title: Prioritize Fixes
howTo.description: Focus on high-priority issues first. Each recommendation includes the impact level and specific steps to fix the issue.

howTo.title: Export and Track
howTo.description: Download the audit report and track your improvements by running follow-up audits after making changes.

tools.description: Analyze backlinks for any website with our free backlink checker. Discover referring domains, anchor texts, and link quality metrics instantly. No signup required, unlimited checks, SEO-grade data.
features: Analyze backlinks for any website domain
View referring domains, anchor texts, and link quality metrics
Discover dofollow and nofollow backlink distribution
Check domain authority and page authority scores
Export backlink data as CSV for reporting
No signup or API key required
Unlimited backlink checks with no daily limits
Fast analysis with results in seconds

faqs.question: How do I check backlinks for a website?
faqs.answer: Enter the domain URL in the input field above and click Check Backlinks. The tool will analyze the site's backlink profile and display referring domains, anchor texts, and link quality metrics.

faqs.question: What is a backlink?
faqs.answer: A backlink is a link from one website to another. Search engines like Google use backlinks as a ranking factor — sites with more high-quality backlinks tend to rank higher in search results.

faqs.question: What makes a good backlink?
faqs.answer: Good backlinks come from authoritative, relevant websites in your niche. They are dofollow links with natural anchor text, placed within relevant content rather than in footers or sidebars.

faqs.question: How can I build more backlinks?
faqs.answer: Common link building strategies include creating valuable content that others want to link to, guest posting on relevant blogs, fixing broken links, and building relationships with other site owners in your niche.

faqs.question: Is this backlink checker free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit Backlink Checker is completely free with no registration required. Check backlinks for unlimited domains with no restrictions.

howTo.title: Enter the Domain URL
howTo.description: Type or paste the website domain you want to analyze into the input field. You can enter the full URL or just the domain name.

howTo.title: Click Check Backlinks
howTo.description: Press the Check Backlinks button and wait while the tool analyzes the site's backlink profile.

howTo.title: Review Referring Domains
howTo.description: Examine the list of websites linking to the domain. Look at domain authority scores and relevance to your niche.

howTo.title: Analyze Anchor Texts
howTo.description: Check the anchor text distribution to understand how other sites describe the linked content.

howTo.title: Export and Track
howTo.description: Download the backlink data as CSV and track changes over time by running periodic checks.

features: Check Google rankings for multiple keywords simultaneously
Track keyword positions across different locations and languages
Export results as CSV for reporting and analysis
Monitor competitor rankings alongside your own
Supports desktop and mobile SERP tracking
No registration or API key required
Fast bulk processing — check up to 100 keywords at once
Accurate real-time SERP position data

faqs.question: How do I check keyword rankings in bulk?
faqs.answer: Enter your domain and paste your list of keywords (one per line) into the input fields above, then click Check Rankings. The tool will check Google SERP positions for all keywords simultaneously.

faqs.question: How many keywords can I check at once?
faqs.answer: You can check up to 100 keywords in a single bulk check. For larger keyword lists, split them into batches of 100 and run multiple checks.

faqs.question: Is this keyword rank checker accurate?
faqs.answer: The tool checks live Google search results to provide real-time ranking positions. Rankings can fluctuate based on location, device, and personalization, so use the results as a general guide rather than absolute values.

faqs.question: Can I track keyword rankings over time?
faqs.answer: This tool provides a snapshot of current rankings. For ongoing rank tracking with historical data, export your results and maintain a spreadsheet, or use the tool periodically to monitor changes.

faqs.question: Is the bulk rank checker free?
faqs.answer: Yes, SopKit Bulk Keyword Rank Checker is completely free with no signup required. Check as many keyword batches as you need with no daily limits.

howTo.title: Enter Your Domain
howTo.description: Type your website domain (e.g., example.com) in the domain input field. Do not include https:// or www.

howTo.title: Paste Your Keywords
howTo.description: Enter the keywords you want to check, one per line, in the keywords text area. You can paste up to 100 keywords at once.

howTo.title: Select Location
howTo.description: Choose the target country or region for the Google search results you want to check.

howTo.title: Click Check Rankings
howTo.description: Press the Check Rankings button and wait while the tool queries Google SERPs for each keyword.

howTo.title: Review and Export Results
howTo.description: View the ranking positions for each keyword. Click Export CSV to download the results for reporting and analysis.

tools.article:
## Simple Calculations for Students
Managing academic scores and attendance shouldn't be stressful. This calculator is built to give you precise, instant answers so you can focus on studying.

### Example
Need to know how many more classes you must attend to reach a 75% threshold? Or maybe you want to convert your CGPA to a standard percentage? Simply input your current numbers, and we'll calculate the exact figures you need.

### Common Use Cases
- Tracking semester goals and required grades.
- Verifying attendance requirements before exams.
- Converting grading scales for scholarship applications.

tools.article:
## Accurate Business & Construction Estimates
Whether you're estimating material costs for a renovation or calculating margins for your business, precision is key. This calculator provides fast, reliable outputs based on your inputs.

### Example
If you are planning to tile a 500 sq ft room, our tool will tell you exactly how many tiles you need, factoring in standard waste percentages. Similarly, financial tools help you instantly see profit margins after taxes and discounts.

### Common Use Cases
- Contractors drafting quick quotes for clients.
- Small business owners analyzing pricing strategies.
- Homeowners planning DIY projects.

faqs.question: Do you save my financial data?
faqs.answer: No, all calculations are performed locally on your device for complete privacy.

faqs.question: Are these estimates guaranteed?
faqs.answer: These are mathematical estimates. Always consult a professional for critical financial or structural decisions.

faqs.question: Can I adjust the tax or waste percentages?
faqs.answer: Yes, most of our calculators allow you to input custom percentage variables.

faqs.question: Does this work offline?
faqs.answer: Once loaded, the calculator logic can function without an active internet connection.

tools.article:
## Prepare Your Images for Forms
Uploading photos to official portals often requires strict adherence to file size and dimension limits. Our tool helps prepare images for forms quickly and easily. By running this utility in your browser, you ensure that your personal documents remain completely private.

### Common Use Cases
- Adjusting dimensions for application portals.
- Shrinking file sizes to meet rigid megabyte or kilobyte limits without losing facial clarity.
- Validating aspect ratios for ID cards and signatures.

faqs.question: Is my personal photo safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, all processing happens locally in your browser. Your images are never uploaded to our servers.

faqs.question: Will the quality be reduced?
faqs.answer: We use smart compression to lower the file size while maintaining the visual clarity required for form submissions.

faqs.question: Can I use this on mobile?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our tool works seamlessly on all modern smartphones.

faqs.question: Is this an official government tool?
faqs.answer: No, we are an independent utility designed to help you prepare your files to meet general requirements.

steps.name: Upload
steps.text: Drag and drop your image or click to select.

steps.name: Adjust
steps.text: Set your target file size or dimensions as required by your form.

steps.name: Download
steps.text: Click to process and download the optimized image instantly.

tools.description: Resize and compress SSC photos to 350x450 pixels and 20KB-50KB, plus resize signatures to 10KB-20KB. No signup required.
features: Resize photos to 350x450 pixels for SSC CGL, CHSL, MTS and other SSC forms

Preview the output before downloading

howTo.name: How to resize and compress a photo for SSC

steps.name: Upload photo or signature
steps.text: Choose a JPG or PNG photo from your device.

steps.name: Use SSC dimensions
steps.text: Keep the default 350x450 photo setting or switch to signature mode if your form asks for a signature file.

steps.name: Compress into the upload band
steps.text: Adjust quality until the file is inside the accepted KB range and still clear.

steps.name: Download and upload
steps.text: Download the processed image and upload it to the official SSC form.

faqs.question: What is the SSC photo size and format?
faqs.answer: SSC forms commonly ask for a passport-style JPG or JPEG photo around 350x450 pixels and 20KB-50KB. Always check the latest notification for your exact exam.

faqs.question: Can I resize an SSC signature here?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use the signature option for a 10KB-20KB target and crop out extra white space before compressing.

faqs.question: Will my photo be uploaded to a server?
faqs.answer: No. The resizing and compression step runs in your browser, so your original and output files stay on your device.

tools.article:
## SSC Photo Resizer for Online Forms

SSC upload portals are strict about photo dimensions and file size. This page targets the common SSC photo and signature upload bands so candidates can prepare images without opening heavy editing software.

## Best input photo
Use a recent passport-style photo with a plain light background. Crop to the face and shoulders first, then compress. For signatures, use dark ink on white paper and crop close to the signature.

Uploading photos to official portals often requires strict adherence to file size and dimension limits. Our tool helps prepare images for forms quickly and easily. By running this utility in your browser, you ensure that your personal documents remain completely private.

### Common Use Cases
- Adjusting dimensions for application portals.
- Shrinking file sizes to meet rigid megabyte or kilobyte limits without losing facial clarity.
- Validating aspect ratios for ID cards and signatures.

faqs.question: Is my personal photo safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, all processing happens locally in your browser. Your images are never uploaded to our servers.

faqs.question: Will the quality be reduced?
faqs.answer: We use smart compression to lower the file size while maintaining the visual clarity required for form submissions.

faqs.question: Can I use this on mobile?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our tool works seamlessly on all modern smartphones.

faqs.question: Is this an official government tool?
faqs.answer: No, we are an independent utility designed to help you prepare your files to meet general requirements.

steps.name: Upload
steps.text: Drag and drop your image or click to select.

steps.name: Adjust
steps.text: Set your target file size or dimensions as required by your form.

steps.name: Download
steps.text: Click to process and download the optimized image instantly.

tools.seoDescription: Privacy-friendly, 100% client-side Passport Photo Maker India online. Run secure local processing in your browser with zero file uploads and no data selling. Fast, safe, and free forever.

faqs.question: What is PII scrubbing?
faqs.answer: PII scrubbing removes personally identifiable information like emails, phone numbers, SSNs, and API keys from text before sharing it with AI models or third parties.

faqs.question: Is the PII Scrubber really private?
faqs.answer: Yes. All scrubbing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript. Your text is never uploaded to any server, ensuring complete privacy.

faqs.question: What types of PII can be scrubbed?
faqs.answer: The tool detects emails, phone numbers, Social Security Numbers, credit card numbers, API keys, IP addresses, and custom patterns you define.

faqs.question: How does the email subject line tester work?
faqs.answer: Paste your subject line and the tool analyzes length, spam words, readability, specificity, personalization, and engagement factors to give you a score and suggestions.

faqs.question: What makes a good email subject line?
faqs.answer: Keep it 30-50 characters, avoid spam trigger words, be specific, use personalization when possible, and front-load the most important words for mobile truncation.

faqs.question: Is my email data stored?
faqs.answer: No. All analysis happens locally in your browser. Your subject lines and email content are never uploaded to our servers.

faqs.answer: The detector analyzes linguistic patterns, perplexity, and burstiness to estimate AI probability. It's a strong indicator but not 100% definitive — always use human judgment for important decisions.

faqs.question: Is my text uploaded to a server?
faqs.answer: No. All analysis happens locally in your browser. Your text is never sent to any external server, ensuring complete privacy.

faqs.question: What are spam trigger words?
faqs.answer: Spam trigger words are phrases and terms that email filters associate with spammy content, such as 'free money', 'act now', 'limited time offer', and excessive punctuation.

faqs.question: Will this guarantee my email won't go to spam?
faqs.answer: No tool can guarantee inbox placement. Spam filters consider many factors beyond words, including sender reputation, authentication, and user engagement. This tool helps reduce one common risk factor.

faqs.question: Is my email content uploaded?
faqs.answer: No. All scanning happens locally in your browser. Your email content is never sent to any server.

faqs.answer: The tool analyzes URL structure, domain registration data, known phishing patterns, and security indicators to assess risk.

faqs.question: Can it detect all phishing sites?
faqs.answer: No tool can catch 100% of phishing sites. This tool checks against known patterns and heuristics, but always use caution with unknown links.

faqs.question: Is my browsing history tracked?
faqs.answer: No. All checks happen locally in your browser. URLs you check are never uploaded to any server.

faqs.question: Is my password sent to a server?
faqs.answer: No. Password strength analysis happens entirely in your browser using JavaScript. Your password is never transmitted anywhere.

faqs.question: How is password strength calculated?
faqs.answer: The tool calculates entropy based on length, character variety, and patterns. It also checks against common passwords and known breach data heuristics.

faqs.question: What is a strong password?
faqs.answer: A strong password is at least 12 characters long, includes uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols, and avoids common words or patterns.

faqs.question: What are security headers?
faqs.answer: Security headers are HTTP response headers that tell browsers how to behave when handling your site's content. Examples include Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, and Strict-Transport-Security.

faqs.question: How do I fix missing headers?
faqs.answer: The tool provides specific recommendations for each missing or misconfigured header. Typically, these are added at the server or CDN level.

faqs.question: Does this tool modify my website?
faqs.answer: No. This is a read-only analysis tool. It checks headers but makes no changes to your website.

howTo.title: Enter URL
howTo.description: Paste the URL of the website you want to analyze.

howTo.title: Check Headers
howTo.description: Click analyze to fetch and inspect the site's security headers.

howTo.title: Review Score

faqs.question: What information does the SSL checker show?
faqs.answer: The tool shows certificate issuer, validity period, domain names covered, encryption algorithms, and chain validation status.

faqs.question: Why is my SSL certificate important?
faqs.answer: SSL certificates encrypt data between your browser and the server. They verify the website's identity and protect against man-in-the-middle attacks.

faqs.question: Is this check accurate?
faqs.answer: The tool uses your browser's built-in TLS/SSL APIs to inspect certificates, providing the same information your browser uses to establish secure connections.

howTo.description: Paste the HTTPS URL of the website you want to check.

howTo.title: Check Certificate

faqs.question: What is domain reputation?
faqs.answer: Domain reputation is a measure of a website's trustworthiness based on factors like domain age, SSL configuration, blacklist status, and DNS records.

faqs.question: How is the trust score calculated?
faqs.answer: The score combines domain age, HTTPS adoption, SSL validity, blacklist status, and DNS configuration health into a single 0-100 rating.

faqs.question: Can this detect all malicious sites?
faqs.answer: No. This tool checks technical indicators but cannot guarantee a site is safe. Always use caution and antivirus software for complete protection.

faqs.question: What is a cookie consent banner?
faqs.answer: A cookie consent banner is a notification that informs visitors about cookie usage and requests their consent, as required by privacy laws like GDPR and ePrivacy Directive.

faqs.question: Is this consent banner GDPR compliant?
faqs.answer: The generated banners provide the necessary UI components for GDPR compliance, but you should consult a legal professional to ensure full compliance with your specific use case.

faqs.question: Can I customize the banner appearance?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can customize colors, fonts, text, position, and behavior to match your website's design.

faqs.question: What is GDPR?
faqs.answer: GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation) is an EU law that gives individuals control over their personal data and imposes strict rules on organizations that collect, process, and store that data.

faqs.question: Is this checker legally binding?
faqs.answer: No. This tool provides a technical assessment only. For legal compliance, consult a qualified privacy lawyer or data protection officer.

faqs.question: What does the compliance score mean?
faqs.answer: The score reflects how well your website implements common GDPR requirements based on automated checks. Higher scores indicate better alignment with GDPR principles.

faqs.question: What is a data retention policy?
faqs.answer: A data retention policy is a document that specifies how long an organization keeps different types of data, when to delete it, and how to securely dispose of it.

faqs.question: Is this policy legally binding?
faqs.answer: The generated policy is a template. You should have it reviewed by legal counsel to ensure it meets your specific regulatory requirements.

faqs.question: Which regulations does it support?
faqs.answer: The generator supports GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, and other major privacy frameworks with jurisdiction-specific retention period recommendations.

faqs.question: What are email headers?
faqs.answer: Email headers are metadata attached to every email that contains routing information, sender details, authentication results, and other technical data.

faqs.question: How do I get email headers?
faqs.answer: In most email clients, you can view headers by opening the email, clicking 'More' or 'View original message', and looking for 'Show original' or 'View headers' options.

faqs.question: Can this detect email spoofing?
faqs.answer: The tool analyzes SPF, DKIM, and DMARC results to help identify potential spoofing, but sophisticated attacks may still bypass these checks.

faqs.question: How does AI image detection work?
faqs.answer: The tool analyzes image metadata, compression artifacts, pixel patterns, and other indicators that are common in AI-generated images from models like DALL-E, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion.

faqs.question: Is my image uploaded?
faqs.answer: No. All analysis happens locally in your browser. Your images are never uploaded to any server.

faqs.question: Can it detect all AI images?
faqs.answer: The tool detects common AI generation artifacts, but sophisticated fakes may evade detection. This tool is a helpful indicator, not definitive proof.

faqs.question: How does breach checking work?
faqs.answer: The tool checks your email or phone against known data breach databases using private hashing techniques. Your actual identifier is never exposed.

faqs.question: Where does breach data come from?
faqs.answer: The tool uses Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) APIs and other reputable breach databases to provide accurate, up-to-date information.

faqs.question: Is my email address stored?
faqs.answer: No. The tool uses k-anonymity to check breaches without revealing your full email address. Your privacy is protected throughout the process.

howTo.title: Enter Email or Phone

howTo.title: Check Breaches
howTo.description: Click check to search against known breach databases privately.

features: Check SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records
Get a deliverability score

Support for any domain
100% client-side — domains stay private

faqs.question: What is email deliverability?
faqs.answer: Email deliverability is the ability to successfully deliver emails to subscribers' inboxes rather than spam or junk folders.

faqs.question: How do I improve deliverability?
faqs.answer: Set up SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records, maintain a clean email list, avoid spam trigger words, and monitor your sender reputation regularly.

faqs.question: Why are my emails going to spam?
faqs.answer: Common causes include missing authentication records, low sender reputation, spammy content, or poor list hygiene. The tool helps identify technical issues.

howTo.title: Enter Domain

faqs.question: What does the privacy policy auditor check?
faqs.answer: The tool checks for required disclosures, data collection statements, user rights, retention periods, third-party sharing clauses, and contact information.

faqs.question: Is this a legal audit?
faqs.answer: No. This is an automated technical check. For legal compliance, consult a qualified privacy lawyer.

faqs.question: How often should I audit my privacy policy?
faqs.answer: Review your privacy policy whenever you change data practices, add new features, or when regulations update. At minimum, audit annually.

faqs.question: Why is email preview important?
faqs.answer: Email clients render HTML differently. Previewing ensures your email looks good across Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, and mobile clients.

faqs.question: Which email clients are supported?
faqs.answer: The tool simulates Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, Yahoo Mail, and common mobile email clients.

faqs.question: Is my email content uploaded?
faqs.answer: No. All previews are generated locally in your browser. Your email HTML and content are never uploaded to any server.

faqs.question: What affects spam score?
faqs.answer: Spam score is affected by content, links, HTML quality, sender reputation, authentication records, and recipient engagement patterns.

faqs.question: How can I improve my spam score?
faqs.answer: Use proper authentication, clean email lists, avoid spam trigger words, balance text-to-image ratio, and include a plain-text version.

faqs.question: Is a low spam score a guarantee?
faqs.answer: No. Spam filters use many signals beyond score. Use this tool as one part of a broader deliverability strategy.

faqs.question: What is consent management?
faqs.answer: Consent management is the process of obtaining, recording, and managing user consent for data processing activities, as required by privacy regulations like GDPR.

faqs.question: Do I need a consent banner?
faqs.answer: If you use cookies or collect personal data from EU or California residents, you likely need a consent mechanism. Consult legal advice for your specific situation.

faqs.question: Can I customize the banner?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can customize colors, text, positioning, and cookie categories to match your website and legal requirements.

faqs.question: When must I notify about a data breach?
faqs.answer: Under GDPR, notify within 72 hours of becoming aware. Under US state laws, timelines vary from 30 to 90 days. Consult legal counsel for your jurisdiction.

faqs.question: Who needs to be notified?
faqs.answer: Typically, you must notify affected individuals, regulators (like Data Protection Authorities), and sometimes the media for large-scale breaches.

faqs.question: Is this template legally sufficient?
faqs.answer: This tool provides a starting template. Have your legal team review and adapt it to your specific breach scenario and jurisdiction.

faqs.question: What is data anonymization?
faqs.answer: Data anonymization is the process of removing or obfuscating personally identifiable information so that individuals cannot be re-identified.

faqs.question: What techniques are covered?
faqs.answer: The report covers pseudonymization, aggregation, k-anonymity, differential privacy, and other common anonymization techniques.

faqs.question: Is this report legally binding?
faqs.answer: No. This is a documentation template. Consult a privacy professional to ensure your anonymization meets legal requirements.
